documents.description: Architecture boundaries, module ownership, dependency direction, and system shape that may affect implementation planning.
Coding style, naming, error handling, and test style rules relevant to changed files.
Additional project documentation to consider only when it is relevant to the requested change.
Repository-wide coding conventions that every diff should satisfy.
Repository-wide contribution expectations to use as baseline review guidance.

rules: If the diff affects UI alignment, line wrapping, overlap, input grouping, or responsive stability, read `ai/UI_DEBUGGING.md` and verify the affected browser rendering.
When browser rendering is verified, create `.phaseharness/runs/<run-id>/outputs/` and save screenshots for each affected route and viewport that was checked.
